data.title: St. Matthew's Parish School reveals campus restoration plans for Fall 2026 in Santa Monica, CA. 100+ attendees present.
data.description: Detailed site plans and renderings for the restoration of the campus were presented at a community event in Santa Monica, California on October 9, 2025. The event drew a crowd of families, faculty, staff, and parishioners eager to see the future of St. Matthew's Parish School. The comprehensive plans showcased are set to be implemented in time for the School's Fall 2026 academic year.

data.title: Investors of V.F. Corporation (VFC) facing losses may contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for options. Call if affected between Oct 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in VFC between October 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025 are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out directly to him. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your legal options, contact him at the provided number.

data.description: On October 9, 2025, RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RMAX), the parent company of REMAX and Motto Mortgage, a leading real estate brokerage franchisor and the sole national mortgage brokerage franchise brand in the U.S., is scheduled to disclose its financial information. This company is known globally and operates in the real estate sector.

data.title: Bitcoin billionaire Arthur Hayes forecasts end of BTC 4-year cycle, cites increased money supply as boon for digital assets.
data.description: Arthur Hayes, a prominent figure in the crypto industry, has made a bold prediction regarding Bitcoin's future. Hayes believes that the traditional four-year cycle of Bitcoin is coming to an end, attributing this change to the potential benefits digital assets will experience due to an increased money supply. This prediction carries weight as Hayes is well-respected in the crypto community and has closely followed Bitcoin's trends. His insight suggests a shift in the typical market behavior of Bitcoin, hinting at potential opportunities for those involved in the digital asset space. Hayes' forecast is significant as it potentially indicates a new era for Bitcoin, stirring discussions among enthusiasts and investors worldwide.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to 5 classes of BX 2025-PURE3, a CMBS securitization, backed by a CAD 505 million loan.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to five classes of BX 2025-PURE3, a Canadian CMBS single-borrower securitization. The collateral for this transaction comprises a CAD 505.0 million floating-rate, interest-only mortgage loan. The loan is anticipated to have a two-year initial term with three one-year extension options and necessitates monthly payments. It will be backed by fee simple interests in 37 industrial assets owned by the borrowers.

data.title: Investors of Cytokinetics urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi for claims between Dec 27, 2023 and May 6, 2025. Loss suffered in that time frame, reach out for options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Cytokinetics to reach out to him directly to explore their options. If you incurred losses in Cytokinetics within the period of December 27, 2023, to May 6, 2025, and wish to discuss your situation, please contact him.

data.title: Megaport released its 2025 Cloud Network Report showing enterprises emphasizing virtualization and orchestration for resilience and performance.
data.description: A company based in Brisbane, Australia, known as Megaport Limited (ASX: MP1), a top provider of Network as a Service (NaaS), has made public its 2025 Cloud Network Report. This report has brought to light a significant shift within the industry, showing that enterprises are not only focusing on expansion and growth but are also concentrating on virtualizing and orchestrating their networks. This move is geared towards providing resilience, sovereignty, and enhanced performance on a large scale. The insights shared in the report are derived from operational data obtained from Megaport’s platform, which covers over 1,000 enabled locations.

data.title: Investors of LifeMD between May 7, 2025 and August 5, 2025 may contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in LifeMD during the period from May 7, 2025, to August 5, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore their potential legal options. If you are among the investors affected during this specified time frame and wish to examine your rights regarding this issue, please consider contacting James (Josh) Wilson for further assistance.

data.title: Drawbridge Realty buys 190,000 sq ft HIVE office campus in Costa Mesa, leases 100% to Anduril Industries.
data.description: A Class A office campus located at 3333-3337 South Susan St. in Costa Mesa's Greater Airport submarket has been acquired by Drawbridge Realty. The acquisition of The HIVE spans 190,000 square feet across three buildings, with Invesco Real Estate as the previous owner. The transaction was facilitated by Eastdil Secured. Drawbridge Realty is in talks with Anduril Industries, Inc., a prominent next-generation defense technology developer, to secure a long-term lease for the entire campus.

data.title: University of Phoenix celebrates 4,361 graduates in Las Vegas with 13,374 guests. A milestone for many first-generation degree earners.
data.description: University of Phoenix recently held its autumn 2025 graduation event in Las Vegas at the Thomas & Mack Center on September 26-27. The ceremony celebrated the accomplishments of 4,361 graduates who were in attendance. With a total of 13,374 individuals present, the arena was full over the course of the two-day event. The graduates, many of whom were the trailblazers in their families in obtaining a degree, were cheered on by the crowd as they walked across the stage. The ceremony highlighted academic achievements and the perseverance and dedication exhibited by the students.

data.title: Terra Innovatum merges with GSRT, starts trading on Nasdaq. Nuclear reactors developer and SPAC finalizes deal.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Terra Innovatum Global N.V., a company specializing in micro-modular nuclear reactors, completed its business combination with GSR III Acquisition Corp., a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company listed on Nasdaq under GSRT. The merger was finalized after receiving shareholder approval at GSRT’s Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders held on October 7, 2025. This development marks a significant milestone in the nuclear energy sector.
